name: Angel Food Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine egg whites, cream of tartar, and salt in a large bowl. Beat to very soft peaks.
2. Turn mixer to the lowest speed. Gradually add sugar 1 tablespoon at a time.
3. Add flour 1 tablespoon at a time. Do not overmix.
4. Fold in vanilla extract, almond extract, and lemon juice.
5. Transfer batter to a nonstick angel food cake pan.
6. Bake on the bottom rack of an oven set to 350°F (175°C) for 45-50 minutes, or until the cake is golden brown and the top cracks and feels dry.
7. Invert the pan and let cool. Remove the cake onto a serving platter.
TO MAKE CHOCOLATE ANGEL FOOD CAKE:
Leave out the lemon juice and add 1/2 cup unsweetened cocoa powder.
